text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I bought so much stuff! ♪ I legit almost shopped
till I dropped! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...Oh! It's already time? I'm going to be late for
training!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Ah, but with Tata, I'll get there lickety-split! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I've made it in time doing this before, and I'll get to enjoy the thrill of a speedy drive to boot! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, Maruzensky hops into her beloved car.
But soon after...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Boo! Why is there so much traffic? I'll have to
take a different route!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Maruzensky blasts off down a road she doesn't
know and ends up missing the day's training.
